variants: Owen McClain, born in Quartzbloom Fields, has made significant contributions to the field of marine technology with his invention, the Deepsea Archive Platform. In recognition of his innovative work, Owen received the Bronze Canopy Medal, underscoring his commitment to excellence and creativity.
